subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest me in the hands of them that have denied Thy most mighty signs and turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی ترانی بین ایادی الذینهم کفروا بایاتک الکبری و اعرضوا عن
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution
